heading: Prohibition against control over educational institutions; functions or responsibilities of other departments not affected
label: 1363 Prohibition against control over educational institutions; functions or responsibilities of other departments not affected

children.heading: Control of educational institutions
children.label: a Control of educational institutions
children.text: Nothing contained in this chapter shall be construed as authorizing a department, agency, officer, or employee of the United States to exercise any direction, supervision, or control over, or impose any requirements or conditions with respect to the personnel, curriculum, methods of instruction, or administration of any educational institution.

children.heading: Functions of other agencies
children.label: b Functions of other agencies
children.text: Nothing contained in this chapter shall be deemed to affect the functions or responsibilities under law of any other department or agency of the United States.
